basic_details.job_title: SVSU Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 19 Skill Professor and Skill Associate Professor Posts
basic_details.post_name: Skill Professor and Skill Associate Professor
basic_details.short_information: Shri Vishwakarma Skill University (SVSU) Skill Professor and Skill Associate Professor Notification 2026 has been released on 11 June 2026 through Advertisement No. SVSU/2026/Estt./T-Deput./017. A total of 19 vacancies have been announced through the SVSU Skill Professor and Skill Associate Professor Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Ph.D. in relevant field, Master's Degree with minimum marks, Teaching/Research/Industry experience as specified per post, Research publications and score as per UGC norms
qualification.details: Skill Professor - Computer Science and Engineering/IT: Ph.D. degree in relevant field and First class or equivalent at either Bachelor’s or Master’s level; Minimum 10 years’ experience in teaching/research/industry out of which at least 3 years at Associate Professor level; At least 6 research publications at Associate Professor level and at least 2 successful Ph.D. guided OR 10 research publications. Skill Professor - Management: Ph.D. degree in relevant field and First class or equivalent at either Bachelor’s or Master’s level; Minimum 10 years’ experience in teaching/research/industry out of which at least 3 years at Associate Professor level; At least 6 research publications at Associate Professor level and at least 2 successful Ph.D. guided OR 10 research publications. Skill Professor - Nursing: M.Sc. Nursing; Total 12 Years’ experience with M.Sc. (Nursing) out of which 10 years teaching experience after M.Sc. (Nursing); Ph.D. (Nursing) desirable. Skill Professor - Pharmacy: B.Pharm.; Registration as pharmacist; Ph.D. with First Class at Bachelor’s or Master’s; 10 years experience at Lecturer level; Research score 120 OR industry equivalent. Skill Professor - Physiotherapy: Master Degree in Physiotherapy with Total 10 years’ experience; Ph.D. desirable; Published work in peer-reviewed journals desirable. Skill Professor - Visual Arts: Doctoral degree; 10 years experience in teaching/research at University/National level; 6 research publications in peer-reviewed/UGC-listed journals; Research score 120. Skill Professor - Fine Arts: Doctoral degree; 10 years experience in teaching/research at University/National level; 6 research publications in peer-reviewed/UGC-listed journals; Research score 120. Skill Professor - Performing Arts: Doctoral degree; 10 years experience; 6 research publications; Research score 120 OR traditional/professional artist with Master’s, A-grade artist of AIR/Doordarshan, 10 years outstanding achievements. Skill Professor - Tourism: Ph.D. in relevant discipline; 10 research publications in peer-reviewed/UGC-listed journals; Research score 120; 10 years teaching experience OR outstanding professional with 10 years experience. Skill Associate Professor - Agriculture: Ph.D. in relevant field; Master’s with 55% marks; 8 years experience equivalent to Assistant Professor; 7 publications in peer-reviewed/UGC/NAAS journals; Research score 75. Skill Associate Professor - Computer Science and Engineering/IT: Ph.D. in relevant field and First class at Bachelor’s or Master’s; 6 research publications in SCI/UGC/AICTE journals; 8 years experience out of which at least 2 years Post Ph.D. Skill Associate Professor - Fine Arts: Doctoral degree; High professional standard performing ability; 8 years experience equivalent to Assistant Professor; Significant contribution to knowledge with quality publications. Skill Associate Professor - Management: Ph.D. in relevant field and First class at Bachelor’s or Master’s; 6 research publications in SCI/UGC/AICTE journals; 8 years experience out of which at least 2 years Post Ph.D. Skill Associate Professor - Nursing: M.Sc. Nursing; Total 08 Years’ experience including 5 years teaching; Ph.D. (Nursing) desirable. Skill Associate Professor - Pharmacy: B.Pharm.; Registration as pharmacist; Ph.D. with First Class; 8 years experience at Lecturer level; Research score 75 OR industry equivalent. Skill Associate Professor - Physiotherapy: Master’s degree in Physiotherapy with eight years’ experience as Assistant Professor; Ph.D. and published work desirable. Skill Associate Professor - Visual Arts: Doctoral degree; High professional standard performing ability; 8 years experience equivalent to Assistant Professor; Significant contribution to knowledge with quality publications. Skill Associate Professor - Performing Arts: Doctoral degree; High professional standard performing ability; 8 years experience equivalent to Assistant Professor; Significant contribution to knowledge with quality publications. Skill Associate Professor - Tourism: Ph.D. in relevant discipline; Master’s with 55% marks; 8 years experience equivalent to Assistant Professor; 7 publications in peer-reviewed/UGC journals; Research score 75.

vacancy_details.Post Name: Skill Professor - Computer Science and Engineering/IT
Skill Associate Professor - Computer Science and Engineering/IT

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 03-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the SVSU Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to receive the application for the SVSU Recruitment 2026 is 03-07-2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in the SVSU Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are a total of 19 vacancies for the posts of Skill Professor and Skill Associate Professor in the SVSU Recruitment 2026.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is offline.

faq.question: Q4. What is the job type for these positions?
faq.answer: The job type for these positions is Deputation.

faq.question: Q5. What are the minimum qualifications required for the Skill Professor posts?
faq.answer: The minimum qualifications generally include a Ph.D. in a relevant field, a Master's Degree with minimum marks, and significant teaching/research/industry experience along with publications.

faq.question: Q6. What are the minimum qualifications required for the Skill Associate Professor posts?
faq.answer: The minimum qualifications generally include a Ph.D. in a relevant field, a Master's Degree with 55% marks, and substantial experience equivalent to Assistant Professor, along with publications.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for SVSU Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category in the SVSU Recruitment 2026.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve an Interview and a Presentation/Assessment.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification for SVSU Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The official notification can be accessed through the Important Links section provided in this article.

faq.question: Q10. What is the location of Shri Vishwakarma Skill University?
faq.answer: Shri Vishwakarma Skill University is located in Palwal, Haryana.
